blocks.text: Level at Camp Nou, desperate at Anfield — England's UCL night

City and Chelsea crashed out yesterday. Arsenal are through. Now Newcastle — level on aggregate at Camp Nou — and Liverpool — needing an Anfield comeback down 1-0 — are the last English clubs standing. Both or bust tonight.
⚽ Sun 13:00 — Tyne-Wear derby: Newcastle United vs Sunderland, St. James' Park
